# chronosphere_bucket (Data Source)

Looks up an existing bucket by name or slug. Use this to reference buckets created outside of Terraform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `labels` (Map of String) Read-only: key/value labels attached to the bucket.
- `name` (String) Name of the bucket to look up. Exactly one of `slug` or `name` must be set.
- `slug` (String) Slug of the bucket to look up. Exactly one of `slug` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Read-only: free-form description of the bucket.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
